name: segmentation-flood
title: Segmentation Flood
description: Machine-vision read of a slotted subject: translucent accent segmentation masks flood on in quantized scanline steps, each region gets a thin bracket and mono label chip, a deterministic 2-frame HUD flicker rides the pass, then the labeled read settles clean.
evidence: Wave M3 experiment slate; gmunk segmentation contact sheet 2031767296331702694/sheet-02 (red masks flooding in scanline steps under HUD flicker), tokenized

variables.label: Regions
variables.description: Comma-separated region labels; 2 to 4 are used, one translucent mask + bracket + mono chip each.

variables.label: Flood at
variables.description: Seconds from mount start when the segmentation pass begins. Clamped so the pass and any exit stay inside the clip.

variables.label: Flicker
variables.description: Deterministic 2-frame HUD luminance toggle riding the flood pass.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Mask, bracket, and chip color: green rides --brand, blue rides --accent, violet rides --accent-2.

variables.label: Exit
variables.description: Optional departure. Default none: the labeled read holds until the frame cuts.
